_comment: Scenario probes for P2 slim (multi-practitioner preference, multi-location, simplified routing): covers STEP 3 practitioner ask before location, silent escape route on practitioner change, CONFIRMATION spoken phrase + tool, cross-object slot prohibition, and asap_slots with practitioner stored.

scenarios.name: P1 — Practitioner gate: agent asks practitioner preference before location and timeframe

history.content: I'd like to book a chiropractic appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks which practitioner the caller prefers (e.g. 'Did you want to book with Alice Brown or James Lee, or is anyone fine?') before asking about location or timeframe. FAIL if agent asks 'Which location works for you?' or 'When would you like to come in?' before the practitioner question fires — ROUTING TABLE row 1 (PRACTITIONER PREFERENCE) must evaluate first.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: spoken phrase AND universal_router confirm_time in same response

history.content: Which location works for you — North Sydney or Parramatta?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "3:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent speaks a confirmation phrase containing '3:00 PM', 'Monday', 'the 22nd', 'Alice', and 'North Sydney' AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-22', appointment_time='15:00', practitioner_id='prac_a', business_id='biz_ns' in the SAME response. FAIL if phrase and tool call are split across two turns, or if tool is omitted.

scenarios.name: S1 — Multi-practitioner slot: cross-object prohibition — each prac's times from their own array

history.content: Which location works for you — North Sydney or Parramatta?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic", "date": "2026-06-18", "day_of_week": "Thursday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-18", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["12:00 PM", "4:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic"}]}, {"practitioner_name": "James Lee", "practitioner_id": "prac_b", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-18", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:30 PM", "3:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks: 'I've got 12:00 PM or 4:00 PM with Alice, and 1:30 PM or 3:30 PM with James — who works better?' (first and last from each practitioner's OWN array). FAIL if agent mixes times across practitioner boundaries (e.g. '12:00 PM or 3:30 PM with Alice' — using James's last slot), lists more than 2 times per practitioner, or silently picks one practitioner.

scenarios.name: PC1 — Practitioner change: silent universal_router intent='change_practitioner'

history.content: Which location works for you — North Sydney or Parramatta?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Alice Brown", "practitioner_id": "prac_a", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "2:00 PM", "3:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_ns", "business_name": "North Sydney Clinic"}]}]}
I've got 1:00 PM or 3:30 PM with Alice — does either of those work for you?
Actually, can I see James Lee instead?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='change_practitioner' immediately with ZERO spoken output (silent escape route, row 10 in the routing table). FAIL if agent speaks any text before calling the tool, asks a clarifying question about the practitioner change, or calls smart_voice_agent.
